1	"""Deepx agent factory: builds :class:`DeepAgentRunner` on top of the OpenAI Agents SDK.
     2	
     3	Layout: constants → subagent ``function_tool`` (nested ``Runner.run`` + per-call session) →
     4	:func:`create_deep_agent` → general-purpose runner → :class:`DeepRunBinding` /
     5	:class:`DeepAgentRunner` → memory loader → exports.
     6	"""
     7	
     8	from __future__ import annotations
     9	
    10	import asyncio
    11	import dataclasses
    12	import re
    13	import uuid
    14	from collections.abc import Sequence
    15	from pathlib import Path
    16	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any, cast
    17	
    18	from agents import Agent, RunContextWrapper, Runner, function_tool
    19	from agents.agent import Agent as AgentType
    20	from agents.lifecycle import RunHooksBase
    21	from agents.model_settings import ModelSettings
    22	from agents.result import RunResult, RunResultStreaming
    23	from agents.run_state import RunState
    24	from agents.tool import Tool
    25	from agents.tool_context import ToolContext
    26	
    27	from deepx.backends.filesystem import FilesystemBackend
    28	from deepx.backends.utils import resolve_root_dir
    29	from deepx.backends.protocol import BackendProtocol
    30	from deepx.context import AgentContext
    31	from deepx.middleware.filesystem import FilesystemHooks
    32	from deepx.middleware.hitl import Hitl
    33	from deepx.middleware.logs import SessionToolLogHooks
    34	from deepx.middleware.observability import setup_observability
    35	from deepx.middleware.run_hooks import compose_run_hooks
    36	from deepx.middleware.tool_pipeline import apply_tool_pipeline
    37	from deepx.sessions import create_session
    38	from deepx.system_prompt import (
    39	    build_system_prompt,
    40	    format_skills_for_prompt,
    41	    skills_catalog_for_host,
    42	)
    43	from deepx.tools import builtin_tools_for_backend
    44	
    45	DEFAULT_MODEL = "gpt-5-mini"
    46	
    47	
    48	if TYPE_CHECKING:
    49	    from agents.lifecycle import AgentHooks
    50	    from agents.prompts import DynamicPromptFunction, Prompt
    51	
    52	    from deepx.tools.planning import Plan
    53	
    54	
    55	def _format_subagent_output(run_result: RunResult | RunResultStreaming) -> str:
    56	    """Match ``Agent.as_tool`` output extraction for nested runs."""
    57	    if run_result.final_output is not None and (
    58	        not isinstance(run_result.final_output, str) or run_result.final_output != ""
    59	    ):
    60	        return str(run_result.final_output)
    61	
    62	    from agents.items import ItemHelpers, MessageOutputItem, ToolCallOutputItem
    63	
    64	    for item in reversed(run_result.new_items):
    65	        if isinstance(item, MessageOutputItem):
    66	            text_output = ItemHelpers.text_message_output(item)
    67	            if text_output:
    68	                return text_output
    69	
    70	        if (
    71	            isinstance(item, ToolCallOutputItem)
    72	            and isinstance(item.output, str)
    73	            and item.output
    74	        ):
    75	            return item.output
    76	
    77	    out = run_result.final_output
    78	    return "" if out is None else str(out)
    79	
    80	
    81	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    82	# Subagent wiring
    83	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    84	
    85	
    86	def _normalize_subagents(
    87	    raw: "Sequence[DeepAgentRunner] | None",
    88	) -> list[DeepAgentRunner]:
    89	    out: list[DeepAgentRunner] = []
    90	    for item in raw or []:
    91	        if isinstance(item, DeepAgentRunner):
    92	            out.append(item)
    93	        else:
    94	            raise TypeError(
    95	                f"subagents entries must be DeepAgentRunner, got {type(item).__name__}"
    96	            )
    97	    return out
    98	
    99	
   100	def _skills_prompt_for_backend(backend: BackendProtocol, skill_roots: list[str]) -> str:
   101	    host = resolve_root_dir(backend)
   102	    if host is None:
   103	        return ""
   104	    meta = skills_catalog_for_host(host, skill_roots)
   105	    return format_skills_for_prompt(meta)
   106	
   107	
   108	def _collect_skill_roots(main: list[str] | None) -> list[str]:
   109	    out: list[str] = []
   110	    seen: set[str] = set()
   111	
   112	    def add(raw: str) -> None:
   113	        rp = str(Path(raw).expanduser().resolve())
   114	        if rp not in seen:
   115	            seen.add(rp)
   116	            out.append(rp)
   117	
   118	    for raw in main or []:
   119	        add(str(raw))
   120	    return out
   121	
   122	
   123	def _tool_names_from_tools(tools: Sequence[Tool]) -> set[str]:
   124	    names: set[str] = set()
   125	    for t in tools:
   126	        n = getattr(t, "name", None)
   127	        if isinstance(n, str) and n:
   128	            names.add(n)
   129	    return names
   130	
   131	
   132	def _validate_interrupt_on_names(
   133	    gated: frozenset[str], tools: Sequence[Tool]
   134	) -> None:
   135	    if not gated:
   136	        return
   137	    known = _tool_names_from_tools(tools)
   138	    unknown = sorted(gated - known)
   139	    if unknown:
   140	        raise ValueError(
   141	            "interrupt_on references unknown tool name(s): "
   142	            + ", ".join(repr(n) for n in unknown)
   143	        )
   144	
   145	
   146	def _merge_optional_agent_fields(
   147	    *,
   148	    model_settings: ModelSettings | None,
   149	    input_guardrails: list[Any] | None,
   150	    output_guardrails: list[Any] | None,
   151	    agent_hooks: "AgentHooks | None",
   152	    tool_use_behavior: Any | None,
   153	    reset_tool_choice: bool | None,
   154	    prompt: "Prompt | DynamicPromptFunction | None",
   155	) -> dict[str, Any]:
   156	    opts: dict[str, Any] = {}
   157	    if model_settings is not None:
   158	        opts["model_settings"] = model_settings
   159	    if input_guardrails is not None:
   160	        opts["input_guardrails"] = input_guardrails
   161	    if output_guardrails is not None:
   162	        opts["output_guardrails"] = output_guardrails
   163	    if agent_hooks is not None:
   164	        opts["hooks"] = agent_hooks
   165	    if tool_use_behavior is not None:
   166	        opts["tool_use_behavior"] = tool_use_behavior
   167	    if reset_tool_choice is not None:
   168	        opts["reset_tool_choice"] = reset_tool_choice
   169	    if prompt is not None:
   170	        opts["prompt"] = prompt
   171	    return opts
   172	
   173	
   174	def _subagent_tool_from_runner(
   175	    *,
   176	    runner: DeepAgentRunner,
   177	    max_turns: int,
   178	) -> Tool:
   179	    """Expose a subagent as a tool: nested ``Runner.run`` with a per-call session."""
   180	    agent = runner._agent
   181	    tname = re.sub(r"[^a-zA-Z0-9_]", "_", runner._agent_name)
   182	
   183	    async def _invoke(ctx: ToolContext, input: str) -> str:
   184	        ac = ctx.context
   185	        if not isinstance(ac, AgentContext):
   186	            raise TypeError("Deepx tools expect AgentContext on the run context")
   187	        sub_backend = runner._backend
   188	        sub_memory = runner._memory
   189	        sub_debug = runner._debug
   190	        ckpt = runner._checkpointer
   191	        skills_sub = _skills_prompt_for_backend(sub_backend, runner._skill_roots)
   192	        sub_sid = f"{ac.session_id}:{agent.name}:{ctx.tool_call_id}"
   193	        sub_ctx = AgentContext(
   194	            session_id=ac.session_id,
   195	            backend=sub_backend,
   196	            agent_name=agent.name,
   197	            memory=sub_memory,
   198	            skills=skills_sub,
   199	            debug=sub_debug,
   200	            resume=False,
   201	            hitl=ac.hitl,
   202	            interrupt_on=runner._interrupt_on,
   203	        )
   204	        session = create_session(sub_sid, ckpt)
   205	        agent_wrapped = runner._prepare_agent()
   206	        hooks = runner._make_hooks()
   207	        run_result = await Runner.run(
   208	            agent_wrapped,
   209	            input,
   210	            context=sub_ctx,
   211	            session=session,
   212	            hooks=hooks,
   213	            max_turns=max_turns,
   214	        )
   215	        return _format_subagent_output(run_result)
   216	
   217	    tool = function_tool(
   218	        _invoke,
   219	        name_override=tname,
   220	        description_override=runner.description or "",
   221	        use_docstring_info=False,
   222	    )
   223	    setattr(tool, "_is_agent_tool", True)
   224	    setattr(tool, "_agent_instance", runner._agent)
   225	    return tool
   226	
   227	
   228	def create_deep_agent(
   229	    model: str = DEFAULT_MODEL,
   230	    tools: list | None = None,
   231	    *,
   232	    name: str = "agent",
   233	    description: str = "",
   234	    system_prompt: str = "",
   235	    subagents: Sequence[DeepAgentRunner] | None = None,
   236	    skills: list[str] | None = None,
   237	    memory: list[str] | None = None,
   238	    response_format: type | None = None,
   239	    backend: BackendProtocol | None = None,
   240	    checkpointer: str = ":memory:",
   241	    debug: bool = True,
   242	    max_turns: int = 1000,
   243	    run_hooks: Sequence[RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]]] = (),
   244	    include_general_purpose: bool = True,
   245	    model_settings: ModelSettings | None = None,
   246	    input_guardrails: list[Any] | None = None,
   247	    output_guardrails: list[Any] | None = None,
   248	    agent_hooks: "AgentHooks | None" = None,
   249	    tool_use_behavior: Any | None = None,
   250	    reset_tool_choice: bool | None = None,
   251	    prompt: "Prompt | DynamicPromptFunction | None" = None,
   252	    interrupt_on: list[str] | None = None,
   253	) -> "DeepAgentRunner":
   254	    """Build a :class:`DeepAgentRunner`: one OpenAI Agents ``Agent`` plus Deepx filesystem, skills, and sessions.
   255	
   256	    **Built-ins**
   257	
   258	    Flat tool list from :mod:`deepx.tools`: ``write_todos``, ``think_tool``, ``ls``, ``read_file``,
   259	    ``write_file``, ``edit_file``, ``grep``, ``glob``, optional ``execute`` (if the backend
   260	    supports shell), and ``save_memory``. Planning and filesystem behavior are also reflected in
   261	    the dynamic system prompt.
   262	
   263	    **Prompting**
   264	
   265	    ``system_prompt`` is only the **role / task** section. The rest (skills index, memory, plan
   266	    snapshot, sandbox rules) comes from :func:`deepx.system_prompt.build_system_prompt`.
   267	
   268	    ``memory`` is a list of **file paths** only (not inline prose). Files load in list order; body
   269	    text is joined with ``\\n\\n`` before insertion into the **MEMORY** section. Relative paths
   270	    resolve against the backend **host_root** first, then the process **cwd**. ``skills`` roots
   271	    keep their list order in the catalog.
   272	
   273	    **Sessions**
   274	
   275	    ``checkpointer`` is a SQLite path (including ``\":memory:\"``) passed to
   276	    :func:`deepx.sessions.create_session` when you :meth:`~DeepAgentRunner.bind`. One bound
   277	    conversation uses **one** session store. Nested specialist **tool** calls use a derived session
   278	    id and the child runner's checkpointer.
   279	
   280	    **Subagents**
   281	
   282	    Each :class:`DeepAgentRunner` is exposed as an SDK ``function_tool`` that runs a nested
   283	    ``Runner.run``. The nested :class:`AgentContext` uses that runner's ``backend``, memory text,
   284	    and debug flag; it **inherits** the parent's ``session_id`` and ``hitl``. Sensitive tools use :data:`interrupt_on` and
   285	    :class:`~deepx.middleware.hitl.Hitl` at :meth:`~DeepAgentRunner.bind` time (not SDK
   286	    ``needs_approval``).
   287	
   288	    **Hooks**
   289	
   290	    ``run_hooks`` are composed **after** :class:`deepx.middleware.filesystem.FilesystemHooks`.
   291	    ``agent_hooks`` map to ``Agent.hooks`` (per-turn agent callbacks), not run-level hooks.
   292	
   293	    **Human-in-the-loop**
   294	
   295	    ``interrupt_on`` lists tool names that require host approval before execution. Each non-empty
   296	    string must match a tool on this agent (built-ins + ``tools=`` + subagent tools) or construction
   297	    raises :class:`ValueError`. Pass a :class:`~deepx.middleware.hitl.Hitl` when calling
   298	    :meth:`~DeepAgentRunner.bind`; nested specialist runs inherit the same coordinator from the
   299	    parent context.
   300	
   301	    **Remote MCP / Hub tools**
   302	
   303	    Deepx does **not** pass ``mcp_servers`` into the OpenAI Agents ``Agent``. Expose MCP servers as
   304	    normal ``function_tool`` / :class:`~agents.tool.FunctionTool` instances on ``tools=`` (for
   305	    example via FastMCP’s ``Client``) so :func:`~deepx.middleware.tool_pipeline.apply_tool_pipeline`
   306	    (eviction + ``interrupt_on`` + :class:`~deepx.middleware.hitl.Hitl`) applies uniformly.
   307	
   308	    **Defaults**
   309	
   310	    ``model`` is :data:`DEFAULT_MODEL`. ``debug=True`` enables :class:`~deepx.middleware.logs.SessionToolLogHooks`,
   311	    writing tool JSON under ``<data_root>/sessions/<id>/logs/tools`` via the backend runtime API.
   312	
   313	    **Returns**
   314	
   315	    :class:`DeepAgentRunner`: call :meth:`~DeepAgentRunner.bind` then ``Runner.run`` or
   316	    ``Runner.run_streamed`` on the :class:`DeepRunBinding`.
   317	    """
   318	    setup_observability()
   319	
   320	    extra_run_hooks = tuple(run_hooks)
   321	    checkpointer = checkpointer.strip() or ":memory:"
   322	    gated = frozenset(
   323	        name.strip()
   324	        for name in (interrupt_on or [])
   325	        if isinstance(name, str) and name.strip()
   326	    )
   327	    sub_runners = _normalize_subagents(subagents)
   328	
   329	    if include_general_purpose and not any(
   330	        r._agent_name == "general_purpose" for r in sub_runners
   331	    ):
   332	        sub_runners = [
   333	            *sub_runners,
   334	            _make_general_purpose_runner(
   335	                model=model,
   336	                user_tools=list(tools or []),
   337	                skills=skills,
   338	                memory=memory,
   339	                resolved_backend=backend or FilesystemBackend(Path.cwd()),
   340	                checkpointer=checkpointer,
   341	                debug=debug,
   342	                max_turns=max_turns,
   343	                extra_run_hooks=extra_run_hooks,
   344	                response_format=response_format,
   345	            ),
   346	        ]
   347	
   348	    skill_roots = _collect_skill_roots(skills)
   349	    resolved_backend = backend or FilesystemBackend(Path.cwd())
   350	    mem_content = _load_memory(memory, resolved_backend)
   351	    user_tools = list(tools or [])
   352	    base_tools: list[Tool] = list(builtin_tools_for_backend(backend=resolved_backend))
   353	
   354	    subagent_tools: list[Tool] = []
   355	    for sub in sub_runners:
   356	        subagent_tools.append(
   357	            _subagent_tool_from_runner(runner=sub, max_turns=max_turns)
   358	        )
   359	
   360	    _main_checkpointer = checkpointer
   361	
   362	    def instructions(ctx: RunContextWrapper, agent: Agent) -> str:
   363	        return build_system_prompt(
   364	            ctx,
   365	            agent,
   366	            custom_prompt=system_prompt,
   367	            checkpointer=_main_checkpointer,
   368	        )
   369	
   370	    merged = _merge_optional_agent_fields(
   371	        model_settings=model_settings,
   372	        input_guardrails=input_guardrails,
   373	        output_guardrails=output_guardrails,
   374	        agent_hooks=agent_hooks,
   375	        tool_use_behavior=tool_use_behavior,
   376	        reset_tool_choice=reset_tool_choice,
   377	        prompt=prompt,
   378	    )
   379	    assembled_tools: list[Tool] = base_tools + user_tools + subagent_tools
   380	    _validate_interrupt_on_names(gated, assembled_tools)
   381	    main_agent = Agent(
   382	        name=name,
   383	        instructions=instructions,
   384	        model=model,
   385	        tools=assembled_tools,
   386	        output_type=response_format,
   387	        **merged,
   388	    )
   389	
   390	    return DeepAgentRunner(
   391	        agent=main_agent,
   392	        backend=resolved_backend,
   393	        checkpointer=checkpointer,
   394	        max_turns=max_turns,
   395	        skill_roots=skill_roots,
   396	        memory=mem_content,
   397	        debug=debug,
   398	        agent_name=name,
   399	        description=description,
   400	        middleware_hooks=extra_run_hooks,
